gaps.title: Hardcoded PASS verdicts
gaps.description: 5 files have hardcoded 'PASS' strings that Inquisition flags as fake green
gaps.fix: Use constants or derive from actual checks

gaps.title: Bare except clauses
gaps.description: 21 files have bare 'except:' without specific exception types
gaps.fix: Replace with 'except Exception as e:' or specific types

gaps.title: Stale receipts
gaps.description: 98 old receipts flagged as stale truth
gaps.fix: Archive old receipts or adjust freshness threshold

gaps.title: 1 broken script
gaps.fix: Identify and fix the broken script

gaps.title: Git dirty state
gaps.description: Smoke test fails on git clean check due to uncommitted changes
gaps.fix: Expected during development, will pass after commit
